pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3.3 recipe.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run correctly on JDK 21 if the source/target compatibility remains at 17, potentially causing class version mismatches or missing language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version from commons-lang3 to rely on the version managed by the Spring Boot parent BOM.

src/main/java/com/kv/demo/jackson/demo/u.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to adopt Spring Boot 3.x default constructor injection behavior.
Remove unused import for @Autowired annotation after its removal from the constructor.
